description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a geometric, minimalist design and a strong emphasis on clean lines and open spaces. The structure features a combination of white and dark exterior walls, with large windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light. The front of the house includes a circular driveway with a landscaped island, while the rear boasts a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, green lawn, and several palm trees. The house appears to have multiple outdoor living areas, including patios and terraces, and a mix of hardscape and softscape elements. The overall layout is expansive, with a clear separation between the main living quarters and outdoor amenities. The architectural style and landscaping suggest a luxurious, contemporary urban residence.
description: A luxurious, modern house with flat roofs, large windows, a circular driveway, and a backyard featuring a pool and palm trees. The design is minimalist with white and dark exterior walls and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, landscaped island, and main entrance with geometric facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior, side patio, and partial view of the backyard with pool and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rectangular swimming pool, green lawn, and several palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, landscaped island, and the full extent of the backyard and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, flat approach with a circular driveway, landscaped island, and a minimalist door set into a geometric facade.
